message:
fix(fwc): handle tagged COSE_Sign1 encoding quirks in capability token parsing

parse_capability_token_bytes now attempts direct CBOR parse first, then
falls back to stripping the 0xD2 tag byte (CBOR tag 18) and retrying.
Some CBOR encoders produce slightly non-standard tagged COSE_Sign1
that the parser rejects on first attempt — this two-pass approach
handles both tagged and untagged variants robustly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
